description: Perplexity provides web-grounded AI and search products, including APIs for search, chat/reasoning, agents, embeddings, and enterprise computer-usage analytics. It also offers an MCP integration so AI assistants can access Perplexity capabilities through the Model Context Protocol.
summary: Perplexity exposes authenticated HTTP APIs at api.perplexity.ai (Agent, Search, Sonar, Embeddings, model listing, and auth-token management under one API platform), a separate bearer-authenticated Computer Analytics HTTP API, and an MCP server at https://www.perplexity.ai/rest/computer/mcp with published OAuth metadata; it also ships an npm-based MCP server CLI package.
